mapper.select: SELECT cuisine AS caixi, image AS tupian, dish_type AS caipinleixing, ingredients AS cailiao, cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, audit_status AS sfsh, audit_reply AS shhf, view_count AS clicknum FROM recipe foreign_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT cuisine AS caixi, image AS tupian, dish_type AS caipinleixing, ingredients AS cailiao, cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, audit_status AS sfsh, audit_reply AS shhf, view_count AS clicknum FROM recipe foreign_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT foreign_recipe.id, foreign_recipe.dish_name AS caipinmingcheng, foreign_recipe.cuisine AS caixi, foreign_recipe.image AS tupian, foreign_recipe.dish_type AS caipinleixing, foreign_recipe.ingredients AS cailiao, foreign_recipe.cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, foreign_recipe.user_id AS userId, foreign_recipe.created_at AS createdAt, foreign_recipe.audit_status AS auditStatus, foreign_recipe.audit_reply AS auditReply, foreign_recipe.view_count AS viewCount, foreign_recipe.source_type AS sourceType FROM recipe foreign_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT foreign_recipe.id, foreign_recipe.dish_name AS caipinmingcheng, foreign_recipe.cuisine AS caixi, foreign_recipe.image AS tupian, foreign_recipe.dish_type AS caipinleixing, foreign_recipe.ingredients AS cailiao, foreign_recipe.cooking_method AS pengrenfangfa, foreign_recipe.user_id AS userId, foreign_recipe.created_at AS createdAt, foreign_recipe.audit_status AS auditStatus, foreign_recipe.audit_reply AS auditReply, foreign_recipe.view_count AS viewCount, foreign_recipe.source_type AS sourceType FROM recipe foreign_recipe 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
